narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 2-B (precinct in Ross County) has 510 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
